copy.title: Drift Wider — Other Side
copy.prompt: Same stunt, other side. Find the wider catch.
copy.game_context: 4-on-4 half-court shell. The point guard threatens a middle drive from the left slot. You are the right wing — the weak side. Your defender stunts off you at the ball.
copy.possession_setup: The ball is at the left slot. You are the right wing. Your defender (x3) is one pass away and steps off you to help on the middle drive.
copy.decision_moment: x3 leans at the ball. His hips turn to the drive. The space wider on the wing arc opens up.
copy.visible_cue: x3 has hands at the ball, hips and chest pointed inside, and a clean gap is open between you and the sideline.
copy.best_read: Slide one step wider on the right-wing arc. The pass beats his recovery and the closeout is too long to contest.
copy.explanation_md: **Same read, other side.** Stunts work the same on both wings. Watch his body, not your spot. The instant he leans, slide wider. The kickout arrives clean and his closeout has further to travel than the pass does.

feedback.correct: Right read. Same stunt, other side. You slid wider and the kickout was open.
feedback.partial: Fade kept spacing, but the wider wing catch was the cleaner shot. Stay on the arc next time.
feedback.wrong: Read his body, not your spot. Stunt off you = drift wider on the arc.

self_review_checklist: Did I see his stunt before I moved?
Did I drift along the arc, not into the paint?
Did I keep my feet ready for the catch?
Did I move the second he stunted?
acceptable_reads: Fade to the corner — keeps spacing but trades the clean wing shot for a contested corner three.
bad_reads: Stand still — defender recovers before the pass.
Cut into the paint — runs into the low man's wall.

drift_wider_on_arc.label: Slide one step wider on the wing arc.
drift_wider_on_arc.feedback_text: Best read. The stunt left the wider spot open. The kickout was clean.

fade_to_corner.label: Fade down to the corner.
fade_to_corner.feedback_text: Okay. Corner relocation kept spacing, but the wider wing was the cleaner catch.
fade_to_corner.partial_feedback_text: Fading kept spacing — the wider wing was the cleaner shot.

stand_in_wing.label: Hold the wing and call for the ball.
stand_in_wing.feedback_text: Not yet. His stunt only buys a half-second. Standing still gives him time to recover.

cut_into_paint.label: Cut into the paint to fill the rim.
cut_into_paint.feedback_text: Not yet. The low man is already there. Widen the kickout instead.
